description: Zuplo is an API gateway and developer platform used to publish and manage APIs and MCP servers. The given zuplo.work domain appears to host tenant-specific deployed endpoints, including AccuWeather's MCP server.
summary: zuplo.work exposes a known public MCP server endpoint for AccuWeather on a tenant subdomain; no public HTTP APIs, GraphQL APIs, or CLIs on zuplo.work itself were found.
